name: grid-core
description: Shared data + calculation core for The Grid. src/central/calc.js is the ONE formula engine (Pulse and Central read the live SQLite DB through it; Register merged into Central in Phase 2); src/_retired/derive.js is quarantined legacy.

scripts.test: node src/central/calc.test.js && node src/central/readiness.test.js && node src/central/render-central.test.js && node src/central/live-count.test.js && node src/central/accordion.test.js && node src/central/central-rebuild.test.js && node src/central/sync-client-filter.test.js
scripts.check: for f in src/central/calc.js src/orchestrator.js src/reconcile.js src/connectors/*.js; do node --check "$f"; done
